# FORTA

> Operational consulting for growing businesses

FORTA helps startups and SMEs streamline operations, find the right people, and implement scalable processes — so you can focus on growth.

## Key Facts

- 7+ years of experience
- 365 clients supported
- 715 successful placements
- 10–12% average business growth in first engagement

## Services

- **Consulting**: We engage leadership teams to understand your business process and build effective strategies.
- **Implementation**: We implement scalable operations without disrupting your current business setup.
- **Recruitment**: We identify the right fit for your business — people who align with your culture and goals.
- **Execution**: We stay to execute the strategy, not just advise. Results-driven partnership.

## Vision

FORTA will release the operational burden, improve efficiency, and scale operations processes without disrupting the current business process/setup.

## Mission

FORTA engages the leadership team to understand the process and build effective strategies and implement scalable operations. We also involve ourselves in identifying the right fit for your business. We grow the business by 10–12% initially.

## Regions Served

Benelux, Nordics, United Kingdom, Middle East (remote, CET business hours)

## Engagement Models

- One-time consultation
- Hourly / daily / project-based partnerships

## Contact

Book a free discovery call via the website contact form.

## Links

- Website: https://nastena8610.github.io/mediakit-website/
